metadata.description: Harnesses, plugins, and skills for development workflows, media management, and conversational alignment.

harnesses.name: david

harnesses.name: researcher
harnesses.description: Research and analysis persona for investigating codebases, APIs, and technical topics

harnesses.name: gitflow

harnesses.name: media-management
harnesses.description: Process downloaded music purchases: extract, tag, import to Apple Music, stage to NAS.

harnesses.name: vendor-harness
harnesses.description: Lifecycle management for LLM vendor harness artifacts — validate, diagnose, feedback, and keep current across Claude Code, Cursor, and Codex.
